test_environment.storage_backend: Local filesystem at C:/dev; Windows filesystem type unavailable because volume query returned Access denied

_windows_contention_note: Windows file-contention bug was surfaced and fixed during candidate stress testing. TC-04-001 and TC-04-008 directly cover the regression path. Annotate notes fields with observed behaviour if any edge cases surface.

test_cases.description: Exclusive lock enforcement — two simultaneous writers; only one acquires lock
test_cases.trigger_condition: Two processes attempt simultaneous lineage write
test_cases.expected_outcome: Only one process acquires lock; second waits or times out; no interleaved records
test_cases.pass_criterion: Lineage file contains no interleaved or partially overlapping records
test_cases.notes: Exclusive lock tested within one process; required two-process write contention not executed.

test_cases.description: Lock timeout — second process returns 409 when lock held beyond timeout
test_cases.trigger_condition: Lock held indefinitely; second process waits beyond 2000ms default timeout
test_cases.expected_outcome: Second process returns 409 LINEAGE_CONFLICT within timeout + 100ms
test_cases.pass_criterion: 409 returned; measured time ≤2100ms from lock attempt
test_cases.notes: Configured short timeout and LINEAGE_CONFLICT tested; default 2000ms plus 100ms bound not measured.

test_cases.description: Stale lock expiry — next process acquires lock after 30s stale lock lifetime
test_cases.trigger_condition: Simulate crashed lock holder; stale lock age ≥30s
test_cases.expected_outcome: Next process acquires lock within 31s of stale lock creation
test_cases.pass_criterion: Lock acquired; no manual intervention required
test_cases.notes: Stale recovery tested with accelerated threshold; 30-second production threshold not measured.

test_cases.description: Unique lineage_id under concurrency — 50 simultaneous commits produce zero duplicate IDs
test_cases.trigger_condition: 50 concurrent commit processes, each generating a lineage record
test_cases.pass_criterion: Zero duplicate lineage_ids in resulting lineage file
test_cases.notes: 50 concurrent threads produced unique IDs; required process-level commits not executed.

test_cases.description: Partial write detection — crash mid-write triggers CORRUPT_RECORD entry
test_cases.expected_outcome: Corrupt record detected; CORRUPT_RECORD lineage entry appended
test_cases.pass_criterion: CORRUPT_RECORD entry present and schema-valid; partial record flagged
test_cases.notes: Invalid trailing bytes quarantined and CORRUPT_RECORD appended.

test_cases.description: Hash chain integrity — 100 sequential commits produce unbroken hash chain
test_cases.expected_outcome: Each record's hash field equals SHA-256 of the previous record
test_cases.pass_criterion: Hash chain validates end-to-end from record 1 to record 100

test_cases.description: Hash chain break detection — integrity check identifies exact corrupt record
test_cases.trigger_condition: Manually corrupt one record in a 100-record lineage file; run integrity check
test_cases.expected_outcome: Integrity check flags the break; exact corrupt record identified in report
test_cases.pass_criterion: Correct record index reported as corrupt; no false positives on other records
test_cases.notes: Integrity audit identified exact corrupted record index.

test_cases.description: 10-writer stress test — 10 concurrent writers × 10 commits each; no loss, corruption, or deadlock
test_cases.trigger_condition: 10 concurrent writer processes, each performing 10 lineage commits
test_cases.expected_outcome: 100 valid records written; lineage file parseable; no deadlock or livelock
test_cases.pass_criterion: Exactly 100 records present; all schema-valid; hash chain intact; no process hung
test_cases.notes: 10 threads x 10 writes passed with no loss; required 10-process stress test not executed.

_additional_test_cases_note: Append any implementation-side test cases beyond the spec-defined set below. total_cases, passed, failed, skipped must reflect all cases including additions.

anomalies: Pytest full suite passed 45/45, but strict gate mapping identified spec cases not exercised at required production fidelity. Production target equivalence and Windows filesystem type are unverified. executed_by uses candidate harness actor ID; no durable production actor binding was available.
